name: SocialShareGate

neutralConcepts: T90 is SOLE entry to the social branch
T91 triggers on SocialShareApproved — never on QuestionnaireAnswered

ironRules.rule: T90 (SocialShareGate) is the SOLE entry to the social branch. No other node can start Branch C.
T90 emits exactly one of: SocialShareApproved (privacy=public) or SocialShareSkipped (privacy=private). Never emits both.
SocialShareSkipped is DataProcessResult.success({ skipped: true }) — not failure. Private mode is a valid outcome.
T91 (QuestionnairePostBuilder) must trigger on SocialShareApproved — never on QuestionnaireAnswered. T90's check cannot block T91 if T91 shares the original trigger.

keywords: social share gate privacy sole entry approved skipped branch topology T91 trigger
